# Generated by exon. Do not edit manually.

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.30)

set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 23)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)
set(CMAKE_EXPERIMENTAL_CXX_IMPORT_STD "451f2fe2-a8a2-47c3-bc32-94786d8fc91b")
set(CMAKE_CXX_MODULE_STD ON)
project(intron LANGUAGES CXX)

if(MSVC)
    add_compile_options(/W4 /wd4996 /utf-8)
    add_compile_definitions(_CRT_SECURE_NO_WARNINGS)
endif()

if(NOT DEFINED EXON_ENABLE_TEST_TARGETS)
    set(EXON_ENABLE_TEST_TARGETS ON)
endif()

include(FetchContent)
if(NOT TARGET cppx)
    FetchContent_Declare(cppx
        GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/misut/cppx.git
        GIT_TAG v1.4.0
        GIT_SHALLOW ON
    )
    FetchContent_MakeAvailable(cppx)
endif()
if(NOT TARGET tomlcpp)
    FetchContent_Declare(tomlcpp
        GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/misut/tomlcpp.git
        GIT_TAG v0.3.0
        GIT_SHALLOW ON
    )
    FetchContent_MakeAvailable(tomlcpp)
endif()

add_library(intron-modules)
target_sources(intron-modules
    PUBLIC FILE_SET CXX_MODULES BASE_DIRS ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR} FILES
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/config.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/installer.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/intron.app.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/intron.domain.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/intron.edge.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/net.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/registry.cppm
)
target_link_libraries(intron-modules PUBLIC
    cppx
    tomlcpp
)

add_executable(intron)
target_sources(intron PRIVATE
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/main.cpp
)
target_link_libraries(intron PRIVATE intron-modules)

set_source_files_properties(
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/config.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/installer.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/intron.app.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/intron.domain.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/intron.edge.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/net.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/registry.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/main.cpp
    PROPERTIES COMPILE_DEFINITIONS
    "EXON_PKG_NAME=\"intron\";EXON_PKG_VERSION=\"0.20.0\""
)

if(PROJECT_IS_TOP_LEVEL)

    if(CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME STREQUAL "Linux")

        target_link_options(intron-modules PRIVATE
            -lssl
            -lcrypto
        )
    endif()

    if(CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME STREQUAL "Darwin")

        target_link_options(intron-modules PRIVATE
            -framework
            Security
            -Wl,-framework,CoreFoundation
        )
    endif()
endif()

if(PROJECT_IS_TOP_LEVEL)

    if(CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME STREQUAL "Linux")

        target_link_options(intron PRIVATE
            -lssl
            -lcrypto
        )
    endif()

    if(CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME STREQUAL "Darwin")

        target_link_options(intron PRIVATE
            -framework
            Security
            -Wl,-framework,CoreFoundation
        )
    endif()
endif()

if(EXON_ENABLE_TEST_TARGETS)

add_executable(test-test_app)
target_sources(test-test_app PRIVATE
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/tests/test_app.cpp
)
target_link_libraries(test-test_app PRIVATE
    intron-modules
)

if(PROJECT_IS_TOP_LEVEL)

    if(CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME STREQUAL "Linux")

        target_link_options(test-test_app PRIVATE
            -lssl
            -lcrypto
        )
    endif()

    if(CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME STREQUAL "Darwin")

        target_link_options(test-test_app PRIVATE
            -framework
            Security
            -Wl,-framework,CoreFoundation
        )
    endif()
endif()

add_executable(test-test_config)
target_sources(test-test_config PRIVATE
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/tests/test_config.cpp
)
target_link_libraries(test-test_config PRIVATE
    intron-modules
)

if(PROJECT_IS_TOP_LEVEL)

    if(CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME STREQUAL "Linux")

        target_link_options(test-test_config PRIVATE
            -lssl
            -lcrypto
        )
    endif()

    if(CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME STREQUAL "Darwin")

        target_link_options(test-test_config PRIVATE
            -framework
            Security
            -Wl,-framework,CoreFoundation
        )
    endif()
endif()

add_executable(test-test_installer)
target_sources(test-test_installer PRIVATE
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/tests/test_installer.cpp
)
target_link_libraries(test-test_installer PRIVATE
    intron-modules
)

if(PROJECT_IS_TOP_LEVEL)

    if(CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME STREQUAL "Linux")

        target_link_options(test-test_installer PRIVATE
            -lssl
            -lcrypto
        )
    endif()

    if(CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME STREQUAL "Darwin")

        target_link_options(test-test_installer PRIVATE
            -framework
            Security
            -Wl,-framework,CoreFoundation
        )
    endif()
endif()

add_executable(test-test_registry)
target_sources(test-test_registry PRIVATE
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/tests/test_registry.cpp
)
target_link_libraries(test-test_registry PRIVATE
    intron-modules
)

if(PROJECT_IS_TOP_LEVEL)

    if(CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME STREQUAL "Linux")

        target_link_options(test-test_registry PRIVATE
            -lssl
            -lcrypto
        )
    endif()

    if(CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME STREQUAL "Darwin")

        target_link_options(test-test_registry PRIVATE
            -framework
            Security
            -Wl,-framework,CoreFoundation
        )
    endif()
endif()
endif()
